review_text: I just tried hiring an attorney at Sullo and Sullo for a recent speeding ticket, and the man I spoke with on the phone was extremely rude. I had a few questions about the process, fees, etc. and he just gave me attitude. When I expressed concern about an issue, he said "well have a nice day" in a sarcastic voice and hung up on me. It was very unprofessional, and I do not recommend going to them.

business_name: Attorney Brian White Personal Injury Lawyer
review_text: Worst law firm I've dealt with in regards to personal injury. I reached out to this firm. I brought my case to this firm in 2021. Me and my significant other were hit by a driver in 2021. Brian white and associates seemed to be a big help in the beginning but after my initial interview and sending over documents. The attorney that was representing my case went ghost. It was never any communication unless I reached out in regards to my case. There was no communication in regards to attorneys being switched on behalf of my case unless I reached out to the firm. I do understand that cases take time and there are several things you have to acquire in order to get the case moving forward. This is way beyond enough time in regards to receiving just an simple update. I never received an update in regards to my case still haven't received one till this day. I requested to be released from the case and they pleaded that  they were going to get a move on things because the attorney that was previously representing my case was released from the Law Firm. I never recently spoke with the new attorney that was on my case as I stated previously until I gave them a call.  This law firm has been a nightmare. Me and my significant other went to therapy took off work and still haven't received any update regarding our case. Recently I called and they still pleaded that they would "love to look into my case" but never look into it just give me the run around and try to keep me on the firm. I repeatedly stated no I would like to be released from the law firm. No response in regards to the process regarding release yet. This is a difficult situation I've been in and by far the worst law firm I've dealt with thus far.

business_name: Attorney Brian White Personal Injury Lawyer
review_text: I just tried contacting their office, and this rude agent just took my call. She was so unprofessional and refused to provide her name, then hung up on me. Wow. Look elsewhere!

The 5-star reviews are fake as hell and you can't tell me otherwise. HELP MY BROTHER SEE HIS SON AND DO BETTER BY PEOPLE. I will be reporting them to the bar.

It was a waste of time and money, not very responsible and unprofessional. I paid $ 1,500 in advance for legal services, when the day of the court date arrived, my representative notified me that the case had been canceled, when in fact it was not true. I hired this firm in April 2023. The process was drawn out and communication was incredibly slow. The worst part is that I have yet to receive any billing explaining the hours billed, despite asking for it on multiple occasions. I have asked for an invoice repeatedly and either get no response or am told 'soon.' Very disappointed in the lack of transparency and professional communication.

Things started off promising but have since gone downhill. I signed my settlement release on July 16th, 2024 and was informed it would take 60-90 days after receiving the check for processing and expense deductions etc. I followed back up in October and Mr. Yost informed me that the check had been received and expense reductions were complete, and he was waiting for an update from accounting. I waited patiently for another 3 MONTHS but heard no updates. I followed up with again with Mr. Yost in January but received no response. I called the firm in February to request an updated timeline, as this has GREATLY EXCEEDED the 60-90 day waiting period that I was told initially. The lady, Erica, who eventually 5 said that it was 'with the partners and out of their hands' and she could not provide me with an updated timeline at this time. Even though it has been over 8 MONTHS since signing the release. I followed up again in March, 2025 and have not heard back from anyone. Extremely poor communication and follow up from the Houston firm. I would not recommend their services to anyone at this point.

It's been almost 3 year since my accident, and I still haven't heard anything back from my accident attorney. The last phone call I received was back in August of 2022. Mind  you my accident happened in October of 2020. I've left several voicemails and no response. I don't recommend this place at all. If I can rate this place a zero star I would have.

I hired this law firm when I was hit head on.  They were very happy to take my case.  I was emailed a contract immediately from the firm. That was the fastest thing that has happened.  I was told the firm would get me Dr appointments. I saw a nurse practitioner my first appt six weeks after my accident.  I did not see a orthopedic dr until 8 weeks after my accident.  By this time my broke bones had grown back together wrong. I am always in pain. This has been a nightmare since day one. I was told I would get a phone call in two weeks to get updates on my case.  When they do call which is not very often.  I get no answers on my case. The lady who calls me always says I'll call you back in two weeks.  The last time I got a call from the firm was over a month ago. I've called back once a week with no return call from anyone. The last time I called the receptionist said he had seen where I had been calling. He was going to file a unsatisfied claim form for me.  He kept apologizing to me that no one is returning my calls.  I have gotten no answers on my case. I may not be a high profiled case. But I still deserve the same attention as a high profiled case.  The firm is still getting paid.  This is unacceptable. Now I'm wondering if they have did anything with my case.  Or am I getting the run around. My accident was June 8th 2022. It's now February 13th 2023. And I still have no idea what is happening with my case. I do understand I'm not the firms only client.  I still deserve answers and compensation. I will never recommend this firm to anyone.

Severe lack of communication and updating client on status of case.  They changed my atty assigned to the case several times and zero notice!  Plus, each one didn't seem to know what work the previous one had done.  They don't listen to the concerns or wishes of the client either.  They just "freelance" it.

This firm is awful. It takes them days to respond to calls and emails, if at all. After a year and a half, I was told that the doctor who had seen me for my injuries was no longer with the practice and would not be available to testify at my trial unless he was paid $10000 to $15000 dollars for his appearance and testimony. My trial was supposed to be on Monday morning and they called and told me this at 3:30pm on Friday afternoon. I told them I still wanted to go to trial, then Mr Daspit himself called me and proceeded to tell me that this was all my fault because I had no common sense, and I would be lucky to get anything. He told me he would settle attempt to get a certain amount if he could get that amount would I give him permission to settle. I told him if he got the amount we agreed upon, which he did not get. He called me back with a lower amount and I told him that is not what we agreed upon and he called me a liar and started yelling at me and refused to let me talk. He said, "I will see you tomorrow" and hung up on me. The next day was Saturday and the day we were supposed to do trial prep. I drove an hour to their office, and no one was there but the IT guy. The IT guy called Zohra, who was supposed to be the attorney handling my case and she told him that they were no longer representing me. I went down to the 19th floor, to their other office and banged on the door until someone came out. It was a paralegal, and she tried to help me, but she said that in their records it showed settled. I told her I would not be signing any paperwork about a settlement because I did not agree to any settlement. I also called the office and left a message stating the same thing. Sunday evening Mr Daspit called me again and tried to bully me into settling. Called me a liar again and said okay well we have a plan to move forward with a settlement. I said you might, but I don't agree to it and it has been 5 days since I have heard from anyone.

horrible!! stay away. after the accident that killed my baby, i was told I couldn't have a neck/back surgery I need because "it's not in the budget", "you can do it on you're own"! after waiting for over a year, won the case 7 months ago & still not been paid, even though they have!!! all I was getting was excuses, now I've been ghosted!!

In August 2023, my mother recommended this law firm. Although she referred me to her lawyer, Yantel assigned me Gary Saunders, who helped me find treatment for my injuries.In November, after a month of unreturned calls and emails, Yantel informed me that Gary was no longer with the firm, but no one had notified his clients. I was then assigned William Morrison, who stopped responding after our first call.When I completed my treatment, my therapist assured me he would submit all the necessary documents to my lawyer. Despite this, I couldn't reach William, so I contacted Yantel again. She informed me that William was still with the firm and advised me to speak to his paralegal, Trish Pieratt. Trish then told me they were missing some medical bills from my physical therapist, who insisted he had already submitted them. After resubmitting the documents, Trish confirmed in late November 2023 that she had everything needed and scheduled my deposition for February.When I followed up in early February for a specific date, I received no response. Frustrated, I contacted another representative, expressing my dissatisfaction with the service. She promised to sort things out, and Trish called back, claiming she was still waiting on records from my physical therapist, contradicting what she previously said. After confronting her, she admitted she had the records since December but now claimed the missing documents were from my initial hospital visit, which I had already provided.Frustrated with the runaround, I requested access to my insurance submissions. Trish refused but gave me her cell number for updates. Despite this, in March 2024, she said they were still waiting on the first hospital document.At this point, I was overwhelmed and decided to give up on dealing with the case, as the car accident had already been a traumatic experience, and the law firm's inconsistencies added significant stress. In April, I contacted Trish again to inform her of another case that was havin

Reason being, it would give the law firm more bargaining power for a better settlement. That is what the lawyer told me.  Well, in my case I got screwed. Ended up being a 75,000.00 settlement of which after they took everything they wanted, I ended up with $17,525.00. A far cry from what it should have been. They are crooked as they come. I didn't even hire Arnold & Itkin but was passed off to them by the law firm  JonesGranger of Texas as well.  Arnold & Itkins 33.33% was, $24,997.50 which included monies to other lawyers. Then, their expenses were $32,477.45 which after talking to a different lawyer I was told that their expenses seemed high.  I spent almost a year after the settling trying to talk to anyone at the firm. But after one initial phone call from their office, my calls were sent to different voice mails and never returned. It took over a year to actually talk to the lawyer who handled the case. His name was Trevor Courtney. I finally got to talk to him in August 2024. Their communication was horrible. All they care about is getting any kind of a settlement so that they can take most of it. God has a very special place in hell for Mr. Trevor Courtney and the acting partners in this law firm. I settled for this little tidbit of a settlement as I just couldn't go on any longer trying to get them to do the right thing. You can't force people to do what is right or to be good. This company is morally corrupt as far as I am concerned. Arnold & Itkin represented 7 other individuals who were suing the BNR and who were involved in this class action suit.  I wonder if those people  got ripped off like I did. I wonder how many of them lost their loved one due to neglect by the railroad? Arnold & Itkin did not represent me or my husband fairly not at all. All they did was take.....

If I could give negative 5 stars I would. Run, do not walk away from the Arnold and Itkin Lawfirm. You will NEVER get to talk to an actual lawyer. You are transferred to third party companies that are robots reading from a computer. Each time you call you will be given different information and time frames. When you call back to question why there has been zero progress when the allotted time frame runs out you are treated VERY RUDELY. The third party person will attempt to gaslight you that you are being unreasonable and pushy just because you are calling them out for not following through with previous promises or meeting stated deadlines. I asked to speak to an actual lawyer who is being PAID through the elusive settlement funds that we have not received,and I am told that is not possible. I pointed out that I, as my son's guardian, have hired and signed a contract for a credentialed lawyer to represent my son and it is my right to actually speak to the person who we have hired.  The call center will not even give me the name of the lawyer who is handling my sons case. I was told 3 weeks ago that there has been a settlement reached in my son's case and that she could not tell me the amount on the phone. She said written correspondence would be mailed and an email would be sent within 2 to 3 weeks to state the amount awarded and to give further instructions. The representative said that legally all of the cases had to be done by the end of June. Today, July 1st, I called and happened to get the same call center person who had given me the 2-3 week time frame previously. I was told that my son still has an approval but the nurse and review team had not gotten the final paperwork submitted

A friend uses Kubosh Law offices for traffic tickets and is very happy.  I called them and hired them to represent me.  The court date was changed to a date that I couldn't make and I was told I could pay them $50 and they would try to move it but no guarantees.  I then decided I would just do defensive driving and they said pay us $300 and we will sign you up (recognize it is something I could have done myself in the beginning for $144 and I would still need to pay the $144 and the cost of the class.  I asked to speak to the attorney and was told that "You can try to figure out how to do that, but we can only give you an email address".  So I emailed the attorney three separate times and received no response.  I terminated the relationship this morning and address the ticket myself in less than 30 minutes.  Not a good experience for me.

Literally got a lawyer for nothing. I got a lawyer for a red light ticket and no license. I ended up getting my license so he got that one removed but there was a misunderstanding with the red light ticket. He asked me if I had insurance I made it clear to him that I did not that it was only my parents on it and that their not willing to add me to it (I know I made it clear because my parents made sure to tell me before I left to court). Fast forward he told me that's fine all I needed to do was a driving course and to bring my certificate on the 11th. I did my class came to court the 11th and once I go up the judge asks me for proof of insurance and drivers license, I'm standing there confused. I explain to her how I already told my lawyer I didn't have insurance and that he said all I needed to do was driving course, she gets upset and explains that I didn't even need to do a driving course because that's not what they agreed on and proceeds to ask again if I have the stuff that is needed I say no and she says okay we'll you have to pay the ticket. I didn't know what else to do so I said okay & she gives me the paper to go down and pay. I contact the firm to see if I can get a hold of my lawyer at this point I'm so mad, I hate not being prepared and on top of that getting embarrassed was not on my list that day. The lady on the phone was the sweetest and very understanding even though I was taking some of my frustration out on her. She mentions that my lawyer said I'm the one that agreed to bring proof of insurance when I NEVER did. She then explains how my lawyer is very hard to reach at the moment but if he's very hard to reach then how did he say I'm the one who agreed to it. She told me to just give her all the details of what happened so she can send it to him and he can contact me. A week has passed and he still has not contacted me. They refused to give me my refund cause of course they are going to believe the lawyers words over mine. I was better off not

I had been using this lawfirm for all my traffic tickets and had no problems until I hired them to represent my dad, they misinformed us with what to do next. They had us come to their office on a Friday then told us to go until Monday to go across to the court and present the paperwork they would give us so that the court could give us another court date. We went on Monday and then they stated that they would send us a new court date and that we didn't need to go to court ourselves and apologized for the prior rep miscommunication. I have also been calling regarding a case I hired them for my son and they have been telling me that Pasadena Court is behind and that they have not yet received a new court date for my son. I called several times requesting update and they say they will email or call us once they receive a new court date. I received a warrant arrest notification letter for my son on Friday 07/14/2023, I called the atty office and the lady that answered keeps repeating herself over and over of how apparently, they did call us and left a voicemail regarding the new court date and that we have to pay more $ to hire them if we need to get represented by them for the warrant of arrest case. Based on my most current experience, I am looking to seek another firm to assist me with my cases. I don't feel as comfortable as I used to with this firm. Never did I imagine they would do this to people that are trusting in their services. Lastly, I received an email with someone else's new court date, I replied to them that the email sent to me is incorrect and has nothing to do with me or my family. So if you are Brady, Guiselle, please be aware that I have proof of the email sent to me by this law firm and my reply to them in case you didn't get it sent to you by the law firm.

I let them know the court said she does not have to appear. No answer until I reach out again after the court date and they say well your daughter did not appear. Fast for 3 months my daughter gets a call form the court and they say we are letting you know you have a court date tomorrow, we are like oh crap she is in college and there is no way she can get down here. So I pay the ticket and send an email and say that the attorney failed to show up and never let us know the date of the reschedule of the court date and as of today 9/4/2022 7:16 am there has been no response.   I would not recommend this firm as they don't communicate they just take your money then you have to pay the ticket anyways. I have decided not to add the communication that we did receive because it would make this review longer than needed because if you read the rest of the reviews they are almost all alike. BEAWARE of this business and find a firm that would do what they say. By the way the response to the refund was that they have worked a lot on the case and would be unfair to refund the money.

review_text: I'm not sure how to review the services of Mr. Thomas.  The people I spoke with at his office were polite, and I did email mail them all of the paperwork that I had on my case, but since I had attempted to do some of the work on my own, I was told my case was to far along and that they would prefer to start a case from the very beginning instead of 30 days before the actual court date was set for.  The only person in Mr. Thomas' office that I spoke with was Ronni Bracken, and even though I emailed her copies of all my paperwork, she did not contact me, I had to call her.  When I did finally speak with Mrs. Bracken again she just referred me to a different attorney that never returned my call.I know Mr. Thomas helps people that are being sued for debt issues and his schedule of fees is upfront and affordable.  What I don't understand is with Mr. Thomas' winning percentage, why doesn't he take almost any case that he is presented with.  Not every case is the same, but cases that deal with Junk Debt Buyers are usually winnable for both an attorney and client if paperwork is submitted from a law office.  It makes the JDB realize that the person they are trying to sue is willing to fight for their rights under the FDCA.I will be honest, I appreciate what you do, and as I have said in my review you do help out lots of people in unfortunate situations.  I will also say that if I had become a client I am sure that my review would have been 5 stars, unfortunately because of a lack of communication from Mrs. Bracken (she should have contacted me after reviewing my case not me calling her 2 days later only to be told to call someone else) I had to review you at 2 stars.  If your office had better communicated with me, and even though not taking my case had referred me to someone that would at least return a phone call (not to mention 2 phone calls) I would have better reviewed your office.

I'll start by saying that this office got my case dismissed, no fees to the court and I wasn't required to attend any court dates. So at the end of it all, they did their job.That being said, it was a HASSLE working with them. I would highly recommend paying a little more for a more organized office. They emphasized the importance of taking a class that the court would probably want, so I made it a priority and hand-delivered the certificate to them. I busted my butt to get their fee paid off as quickly as possible so that they could finish out the case, because they kept telling me they couldn't until I paid. I completed the course in June and paid them off in August, the case was finally settled the following March.  Later I got a letter from them stating I needed to be in court on a certain day, so I took off work and made all the arrangements, left super early in the morning and traveled downtown from Cedar Park through traffic and sat at the court for over two hours with no sign of my lawyer before finally calling the office, only to find out I didn't need to be there at all.After that, I had to call them every month for an update, I never got any information from them without actively pursuing them. It was rescheduled over and over, but I kept in contact with them to keep myself in the loop. In early March I called to check on my Feb 21 court date and was asked if I'd sent in the community service paperwork they requested. I had gotten no such request, no letter, no notice, and suddenly had 2 weeks to get 30 hours of community service. Luckily, I volunteer at a non-profit and got it faxed over the next day. I called to confirm they got it and verified that they had all the paperwork they needed and they didn't need anyone else. I was told they had everything, and they'd call me after the court date.On March 27, the court date, I get a call mid day saying the lawyer is at the courthouse and they're ready to dismiss but they don't have my class certificate and can I send it right then. I was livid! I told them I'm at work and they should have it, I hand delivered it and had confirmed only weeks before that they DID have it. They rescheduled and I told them to double check and if they didn't have it to let me know. I heard nothing and assumed they had found it. Thursday March 29 at 6:15pm, after their office was closed, they tell me I need to send the certificate for my 8:30am court date. I faxed it over about 7:30pm that night with a note to please let me know they received it and all was well. I heard nothing, I called the office in the morning and no one knew.  Later that afternoon they call, and the manager requests to speak with me. He says, "You know we got your case dismissed, right?" NOPE. He says he knows I was upset yesterday and wanted to know why. I calmly proceeded to detail all these things out. I work in customer service, I get that things go wrong. But every single step of the way they failed to follow through. The manager interrupted me every time he asked me a question, he made excuses and blamed others for every misstep, and had the audacity to tell me that all the misinformation I received was because people the office "just didn't take the time to look". I found out in this conversation that I actually didn't need community service after all, someone just made that up. He blamed their losing my certificate on their switch over to a new system, and that I was told they had it by someone who once again, just didn't check. When I explained to him that that's unacceptable, he proceeded to start lecturing me on how they showed up to all the court dates for me and I'm just complaining about a piece of paper and a phone call. I finally had to de-escalate the situation by telling him that we were going to have to agree to disagree, they believed they did nothing wrong and I felt otherwise, but I was grateful for the outcome and that was that. He continued to berate me, at which point I repeated my statement, told him to have a nice day and hung up. It was the most unprofessional, immature, unproductive conversation I've ever had. If I treated any of my clients that way I'd lose my job. His response to that was, "Well this is different."Since he believes that his business doesn't have to treat their clients with any respect, or follow up on their responsibilities, I felt the need to share with the greater community. If you need a lawyer, FIND SOMEONE ELSE.

business_name: Law Offices of Rebecca Gonzalez, PC
review_text: I had a very simple modification case that only required changing my custody order from aChild over three to a child under three years old. Rebecca Gonzalez is the person that did the initial consultation which is allegedly free. After selling me a dream, she then assigned an assistant attorney to my case without making me aware. When my initial hearing occurred via Zoom the assistant attorney was not prepared and there was a continuance. This is how the firm makes their money. They bill at an excessive rate in 15 minute increments and have a very creative way of billing. She bills for internal conversations with her assistant attorney who should already be trained in simple custody cases. This firm requires that you keep $1500 on your account at all times regardless of if they are doing any work for you or not. Hence, they are floating their client's money in order to gain interest and therefore make more money. I spent hours providing discovery for my case and the attorney that was assigned to me did not even review it. I literally had to advocate for myself in order to ensure that my one year old childreceived an appropriate order. After spending $6,100.00 I received temporary orders from the judge and the firm asked for more money in order to submit the temporary order to the court. Alma, the secretary had made me  aware that the $6,100 that was paid would include the submission of the temporary order. She lied. I sent an email outlining all of the charges disputing their creative billing process. This firm literally bills in 15 minute increments for things that take 2-3 minutes such as sending an email. After disputing the charges and asking for a motion to withdrawal from Rebecca Gonzalez's firm as my legal counsel, I received no response. Instead, I was mailed a motion from Rebecca Gonzalez to withdrawal me as her client because of ineffective communication. These people did not fulfill their promise to handle my case properly. They still have not submitted the temporary order I paid $6,100.00 for and they take advantage of people when they are at their worse going through family matters. DO NOT USE THIS FIRM! I will be reporting her to the national bar association as well as disputing the charges that they added up so creatively. Now, I am left to find another attorney who can actually file the temporary order and eventually get me a permanent order. These people are money hungry and lack proper communication skills. Rebecca uses her family name in order to make it seem like she is a great attorney in her field. However, she is tarnishing the Gonzalez name and she will eventually reap what she sows. Everything about this law firm is unethical. Don't let her sell you a dream because you will only end up with a nightmare.
